subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-07-21 in New York
subcodes.first_line: I feel a zephyr blowing from the Supreme Kingdom towards America. It will continue to blow. I hope it brings the utmost strength to the Covenant.
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Christ; Christianity, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
